message:
feat(server): add auth-helper URL generation for inbox and unified-inbox client-side actions

Update the inbox and unified-inbox HTML templates to route all client-
side fetch/navigation URLs through window.agentMailAppendAuth() instead
of constructing bare paths. This ensures token-authenticated sessions
work correctly for mark-read, mark-all-read, thread navigation, and
unified-inbox pagination actions.

Also adds created_ts passthrough assertions and test coverage for the
auth-helper URL patterns in both the per-project inbox and the unified
inbox render paths.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
